prompts.name: Paper Summarizer
prompts.content:
Please provide a comprehensive summary of the following research paper. Include:
1. Main research question/objective
2. Methodology used
3. Key findings
4. Implications and limitations
5. How it relates to the broader field

Paper: [Paper title or content]

prompts.name: Grant Funder Explorer
prompts.content:
Can you do a deep analysis of [Funder website / name] and provide:
1. Their funding priorities and focus areas
2. Typical grant sizes and duration
3. Eligibility requirements
4. Application deadlines and cycles
5. Success rate if available
6. Tips for a strong application

prompts.name: Code Reviewer
prompts.content:
Review the following code for:
1. Bugs and potential issues
2. Performance improvements
3. Security vulnerabilities
4. Code style and best practices
5. Suggestions for refactoring

Language: [Programming language]
Code:
```
[Code to review]
```

prompts.name: Market Research Analyst
prompts.content:
Conduct a market research analysis for [Product or service] in the [Target market] sector. Include:
1. Market size and growth trends
2. Key competitors and their positioning
3. Target audience demographics
4. SWOT analysis
5. Recommended go-to-market strategy

prompts.name: Email Drafter
prompts.content:
Draft a professional email with the following details:
- Recipient: [Recipient name and role]
- Purpose: [Email purpose]
- Tone: [Formal/Casual/Friendly]
- Key points to include: [Key points]

Please provide a subject line and the email body.

prompts.name: Learning Plan Creator
prompts.content:
Create a structured learning plan for [Topic or skill] over [Time period]. Include:
1. Prerequisites and foundational knowledge needed
2. Week-by-week breakdown of topics
3. Recommended resources (books, courses, tutorials)
4. Practice exercises and projects
5. Milestones and assessment criteria

prompts.name: Data Analysis Helper
prompts.content:
I have a dataset about [Dataset description]. Help me:
1. Identify the most relevant analyses to run
2. Suggest appropriate statistical tests
3. Recommend visualization approaches
4. Interpret the following results: [Results to interpret]
5. Identify potential biases or limitations

prompts.name: Meeting Agenda Builder
prompts.content:
Create a structured meeting agenda for:
- Meeting topic: [Meeting topic]
- Duration: [Meeting duration]
- Attendees: [List of attendees and roles]
- Goals: [Meeting goals]

Include time allocations, discussion points, and action items template.

prompts.name: Writing Style Adapter
prompts.content:
Rewrite the following text in [Target style] style while preserving the core message:

Original text:
[Text to rewrite]

Additional instructions: [Any specific requirements]

prompts.name: Debate Prep Assistant
prompts.content:
Help me prepare arguments for a debate on [Debate topic]. I am arguing [For/Against]. Provide:
1. Three strongest arguments for my position
2. Anticipated counterarguments and rebuttals
3. Key evidence and statistics to cite
4. Opening and closing statement drafts
5. Potential weaknesses in my position to address

prompts.name: API Documentation Writer
prompts.content:
Write API documentation for the following endpoint:
- Endpoint: [API endpoint]
- Method: [HTTP method]
- Description: [What it does]

Include request/response examples, error codes, authentication requirements, and rate limits.

prompts.name: Interview Question Generator
prompts.content:
Generate interview questions for a [Job title] position at [Company type]. Include:
1. Technical/skill-based questions (5)
2. Behavioral questions using STAR format (5)
3. Culture fit questions (3)
4. Questions the candidate should ask (3)
5. Evaluation rubric for each question

prompts.name: Bug Report Analyzer
prompts.content:
Analyze this bug report and help me debug:
- Error message: [Error message]
- Expected behavior: [Expected behavior]
- Actual behavior: [Actual behavior]
- Steps to reproduce: [Steps]
- Environment: [OS/Browser/Version]

Provide potential causes ranked by likelihood and debugging steps.

prompts.name: Content Calendar Planner
prompts.content:
Create a [Time period] content calendar for [Platform or channel] focused on [Topic/niche]. Include:
1. Posting schedule and frequency
2. Content themes for each week
3. Specific post ideas with hooks
4. Hashtag strategy
5. Engagement tactics and CTAs

prompts.name: System Design Architect
prompts.content:
Design a system architecture for [System description] that needs to handle [Scale requirements]. Cover:
1. High-level architecture diagram (describe components)
2. Database schema design
3. API design
4. Scalability considerations
5. Security measures
6. Technology stack recommendations
